title: Rust announce scheduler (periodic TX)
description:
Port the announce scheduler from Python to Rust.

Python reference: python/src/lichen/announce/scheduler.py (303 LoC)

Required functionality:
- Periodic announce transmission (spec 9.4: 300s interval)
- Random jitter (0-30s) to prevent collision
- Sequence number management (16-bit, wrapping)
- Initial delay (let node discover peers first)
- Manual trigger support
- Persistence callback for seq_num

This is the TX path that generates and sends announces.
close_reason: Implemented Rust announce scheduler in rust/lichen-node/src/scheduler.rs. Features: periodic TX (300s default), random jitter (0-30s), 16-bit wrapping seq_num, initial delay, manual trigger via send_now(), persistence callback on_seq_change. Added tokio dep for async timing. All 6 scheduler tests pass.
